title: The UGS welcomes the European Industrial Maritime Strategy and calls for shipping at the heart of EU strategic policymaking
summary_full: The Union of Greek Shipowners (UGS) has welcomed the EU Industrial Maritime Strategy, highlighting its recognition of the strategic importance of shipping for Europe’s economy, security and global competitiveness. According to UGS President Melina Travlos, “the Strategy comes at a critical moment for the EU”, as the global geopolitical and economic landscape continues to shift […]
